stemHtml: A heavy aircraft is landing behind a light aircraft. ATC asks the heavy aircraft to reduce 20 kt. Why?

options.a: The pilot shall NOT receive a landing clearance and will be expected to land after the preceding aircraft vacates the runway.
options.c: To get a safe order flow of traffic.
options.d: The pilot must NOT delay the approach and must maintain high speed until at least 4 NM to touchdown.
